autoflatten.name: Automatically flatten new actors
autoflatten.hint: When enabled, any eligible actor created in the world (for example, dragged in from a compendium) is flattened automatically.

flattenPcs.name: Enable flattening for PCs
flattenPcs.hint: Allow the flatten/unflatten actions to apply to player characters in addition to NPCs.

multiplier.name: Reduced proficiency mode
multiplier.hint: How much of an actor's level is removed from proficiency. Unflatten and reflatten existing actors to apply a change.

roundingMode.name: Rounding mode
roundingMode.hint: Rounding applied when calculating the half-level value. Unflatten and reflatten existing actors to apply a change.
